title: cyperus niederleinianus
intro: Cyperus niederleinianus, also known as the South American papyrus sedge or niederlein's sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus niederleinianus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Cyperus niederleinianus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
